016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.microservice.test;
018
019import java.lang.reflect.*;
020import java.net.*;
021
022import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.microservice.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.rest.client.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.test.junit.*;
027import org.eclipse.jetty.server.*;
028import org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.*;
029
030/**
031 * JUnit 5 extension behind {@link MicroserviceTest @MicroserviceTest}: boots a whole
032 * {@link Microservice} (config + lifecycle + embedded Jetty on an ephemeral port) for the test class, with
033 * {@link TestBean @TestBean} mock-bean injection and convenience parameter resolution.
034 *
035 * <h5 class='topic'>Lifecycle (per class)</h5>
036 *
037 * <p>
038 * The microservice is built + {@link Microservice#start() started} once in {@code beforeAll} and
039 * {@link Microservice#stop() stopped} in {@code afterAll}. A fresh instance is booted per class and stopped
040 * cleanly &mdash; never reused, since {@code Microservice} restart is unsupported (the {@code stopped} flag is
041 * one-way, the bean store is closed, and each {@code start()} adds a JVM shutdown hook). The bound port is read
042 * from the live {@link ServerConnector} (never hard-coded), mirroring the established fixture pattern.
043 *
044 * <h5 class='topic'>Mock-bean injection</h5>
045 *
046 * <p>
047 * {@link TestBean @TestBean} declarations are discovered via
048 * {@link JuneauBeanStoreExtension#discoverOverrides(Object)}. <b>Mode INJECT</b> (the default) installs the
049 * overrides via {@code Microservice.Builder.overridingBeanStore(...)} <i>before</i> boot, so the service reads
050 * them from startup. <b>Mode OVERLAY</b> pushes the overrides onto the booted instance's bean store for the
051 * class duration and pops them in teardown.
052 *
053 * <h5 class='topic'>Parameter resolution</h5>
054 *
055 * <p>
056 * Resolves {@link RestClient} (bound to the booted root URL), {@link Microservice}, {@link WritableBeanStore},
057 * and the bound port ({@code int} / {@code Integer}) on test + lifecycle method parameters.
058 *
059 * @since 10.0.0
060 */
061@SuppressWarnings({
062   "resource"
063})
064public class MicroserviceExtension implements BeforeAllCallback, AfterAllCallback, ParameterResolver {
065
066   /** Default name of the optional {@code static Microservice.Builder} supplier method on the test class. */
067   public static final String BUILDER_SUPPLIER_METHOD = "microserviceBuilder";
068
069   private static final ExtensionContext.Namespace NAMESPACE = ExtensionContext.Namespace.create(MicroserviceExtension.class);
070   private static final String KEY_STATE = "state";
071
072   /** Per-class booted state. */
073   private static final class State {
074      Microservice microservice;
075      RestClient client;
076      URI rootUrl;
077      WritableBeanStore beanStore;
078      Snapshot overlaySnapshot;   // non-null when Mode OVERLAY was pushed
079   }
080
081   @Override /* BeforeAllCallback */
082   public void beforeAll(ExtensionContext context) throws Exception {
083      var testClass = context.getRequiredTestClass();
084      var ann = findAnnotation(testClass);
085
086      // Discover @TestBean overrides from the test class (static members participate at class-boot time).
087      var instance = instantiateForDiscovery(testClass);
088      var overrides = JuneauBeanStoreExtension.discoverOverrides(instance);
089
090      var builder = resolveBuilder(testClass, ann);
091
092      // The user's configurations come first (so @Bean Servlet methods are visible), then the ephemeral Jetty
093      // server (port 0), then JettyConfiguration wires the lifecycle. BeanStore returns the first registered
094      // match, so a user-supplied @Bean Server still wins.
095      builder.configurations(ann.configurations());
096      builder.configurations(EphemeralJettyServerConfig.class, JettyConfiguration.class);
097
098      var injecting = ! overrides.isEmpty() && overrides.mode() == Mode.INJECT;
099      if (injecting)
100         builder.overridingBeanStore(overrides.store());
101
102      var state = new State();
103      state.microservice = builder.build();
104      state.microservice.start();
105      state.beanStore = state.microservice.getBeanStore();
106      state.rootUrl = resolveRootUrl(state.microservice);
107      state.client = RestClient.builder().rootUrl(state.rootUrl.toString()).build();
108
109      // Mode OVERLAY: push the overrides onto the booted instance's bean store for the class duration.
110      if (! overrides.isEmpty() && overrides.mode() == Mode.OVERLAY)
111         state.overlaySnapshot = state.beanStore.pushOverlay(overrides.store());
112
113      context.getStore(NAMESPACE).put(KEY_STATE, state);
114   }
115
116   @Override /* AfterAllCallback */
117   public void afterAll(ExtensionContext context) {
118      var state = (State) context.getStore(NAMESPACE).remove(KEY_STATE);
119      if (state == null)
120         return;
121      try {
122         if (state.overlaySnapshot != null)
123            state.beanStore.popOverlay(state.overlaySnapshot);
124      } finally {
125         try {
126            if (state.client != null)
127               state.client.close();
128         } catch (Exception e) {  // HTT: RestClient.close() failure is not reproducible against the in-process JDK transport.
129            // Best-effort close; never mask teardown.
130         } finally {
131            if (state.microservice != null)
132               safeStop(state.microservice);
133         }
134      }
135   }
136
137   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
138   // ParameterResolver
139   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
140
141   @Override /* ParameterResolver */
142   public boolean supportsParameter(ParameterContext pc, ExtensionContext ec) {
143      var t = pc.getParameter().getType();
144      return t == RestClient.class || t == Microservice.class || t == WritableBeanStore.class
145         || t == int.class || t == Integer.class;
146   }
147
148   @Override /* ParameterResolver */
149   public Object resolveParameter(ParameterContext pc, ExtensionContext ec) {
150      var state = readState(ec);
151      if (state == null)
152         throw new ParameterResolutionException("@MicroserviceTest has no booted microservice to resolve from.");
153      var t = pc.getParameter().getType();
154      if (t == RestClient.class)
155         return state.client;
156      if (t == Microservice.class)
157         return state.microservice;
158      if (t == WritableBeanStore.class)
159         return state.beanStore;
160      if (t == int.class || t == Integer.class)
161         return state.rootUrl.getPort();
162      throw new ParameterResolutionException("Unsupported @MicroserviceTest parameter type: " + t.getName());
163   }
164
165   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
166   // Helpers
167   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
168
169   private static MicroserviceTest findAnnotation(Class<?> testClass) {
170      for (var c = testClass; c != null; c = c.getSuperclass()) {
171         var a = c.getAnnotation(MicroserviceTest.class);
172         if (a != null)
173            return a;
174      }
175      throw new ExtensionContextException("@MicroserviceTest annotation not found on " + testClass.getName());
176   }
177
178   @SuppressWarnings("java:S3011") // setAccessible required: builder supplier method may be package-private or private by test-class convention.
179   private static Microservice.Builder resolveBuilder(Class<?> testClass, MicroserviceTest ann) {
180      var m = findBuilderSupplier(testClass, ann.builderMethod());
181      if (m == null)
182         return Microservice.create();
183      try {
184         m.setAccessible(true);
185         var result = m.invoke(null);
186         if (! (result instanceof Microservice.Builder b))
187            throw new ExtensionContextException(
188               "@MicroserviceTest builder method '" + ann.builderMethod() + "' on " + testClass.getName()
189               + " must return a Microservice.Builder.");
190         return b;
191      } catch (ReflectiveOperationException e) {
192         throw new ExtensionContextException(
193            "Failed to invoke @MicroserviceTest builder method '" + ann.builderMethod() + "' on " + testClass.getName(), e);
194      }
195   }
196
197   private static Method findBuilderSupplier(Class<?> testClass, String name) {
198      for (var c = testClass; c != null; c = c.getSuperclass()) {
199         try {
200            var m = c.getDeclaredMethod(name);
201            if (Modifier.isStatic(m.getModifiers()))
202               return m;
203            throw new ExtensionContextException(
204               "@MicroserviceTest builder method '" + name + "' on " + c.getName() + " must be static.");
205         } catch (NoSuchMethodException e) {
206            // Try the superclass.
207         }
208      }
209      return null;
210   }
211
212   /**
213    * Instantiates the test class via its no-arg constructor purely to drive {@code @TestBean} discovery (which
214    * reads instance + static members). Falls back to a hierarchy-static-only scan if no usable no-arg ctor exists.
215    */
216   @SuppressWarnings("java:S3011") // setAccessible required: test class no-arg constructor may be package-private for JUnit lifecycle reasons.
217   private static Object instantiateForDiscovery(Class<?> testClass) {
218      try {
219         var ctor = testClass.getDeclaredConstructor();
220         ctor.setAccessible(true);
221         return ctor.newInstance();
222      } catch (ReflectiveOperationException e) {
223         // No accessible no-arg ctor (e.g. @TestInstance(PER_CLASS) with constructor injection). Static-only
224         // @TestBean discovery still works via a throwaway minimal instance of Object's identity is impossible,
225         // so re-raise with guidance.
226         throw new ExtensionContextException(
227            "@MicroserviceTest requires a no-arg constructor on " + testClass.getName()
228            + " to discover @TestBean overrides before boot.", e);
229      }
230   }
231
232   private static URI resolveRootUrl(Microservice microservice) {
233      var component = microservice.getBeanStore().getBean(JettyServerComponent.class).orElseThrow(
234         () -> new ExtensionContextException("@MicroserviceTest could not find a JettyServerComponent after start()."));
235      var server = component.getServer();
236      var localPort = -1;
237      for (var c : server.getConnectors()) {
238         if (c instanceof ServerConnector sc) {
239            localPort = sc.getLocalPort();
240            break;
241         }
242      }
243      if (localPort <= 0)
244         throw new ExtensionContextException("@MicroserviceTest could not determine the bound ServerConnector port after start().");
245      return URI.create("http://localhost:" + localPort);
246   }
247
248   private static void safeStop(Microservice microservice) {
249      try {
250         microservice.stop();
251      } catch (Exception e) {  // HTT: Microservice.stop() failure mid-teardown is not reproducible in the happy-path test boot.
252         throw new ExtensionContextException("@MicroserviceTest failed to stop the microservice.", e);
253      }
254   }
255
256   private static State readState(ExtensionContext context) {
257      for (var c = context; c != null; c = c.getParent().orElse(null)) {
258         var s = (State) c.getStore(NAMESPACE).get(KEY_STATE);
259         if (s != null)
260            return s;
261      }
262      return null;
263   }
264}
